body:
## Context
Shows all non-membership payments — event costs, donations, and share purchases. Membership dues are on the Membership tab.

## What to do

### Create `src/app/(member)/member/payments/page.tsx`

**Summary cards (3):**
- Paid This Year (non-membership total)
- Outstanding (unpaid event charges)
- Donations (total donated)

**"Record Donation" button** — opens slide-out panel

**Payment History table:**
- Excludes type='membership'
- Columns: Date, Type (badge), Description, Method, Amount, Status
- Types shown: Event (amber), Donation (blue), Shares (purple)

### Record Donation slide-out panel
- Donation type select (General, Car Blessing, Christmas Caroling, Event Specific, Other)
- Amount input
- Note (optional)
- Calls `recordDonation` server action

## Design reference
See Payments tab in `mockup-member-portal.html`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Table excludes membership payments
- [ ] Summary cards are accurate
- [ ] Record Donation panel works and creates a payment record
- [ ] New donations appear in the table after submission

## Dependencies
- #155 (member layout)
- #148, #149 (payments + event_charges tables)
- #153 (donations server action)
title: Member portal: Payments tab
